ab: ksyuga ta’ cikay pila’ su’ ku?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: ksyugay ta’ cikay pila’ su’ ma’?
aw’ ay. pira’ pila’ ksyugan su’?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: zmungi saku’ maras pila’ la, ksyugay ta’ cikay pila’ su’ hku?
ch: A+:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: zmungi saku’ maras pila’ la, ksyugay ta’ cikay pila’ su’ hma’?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: zngyan maku’ maras pila’ la. ksyugay ta’ cikay pila’ su’ hku?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: zngyan maku’ maras pila’ la. ksyugay ta’ cikay pila’ su’ hma’?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: nyux saku’ ini’ aras ay!
en: B: I don’t have any money either!

ab: zmungi saku’ maras pila’ la, ksyugay ta’ cikay pila’ su’ hkuhma’?
ch: A+:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: zngyan maku’ maras pila’ la. ksyugay ta’ cikay pila’ su’ hku?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: zngyan maku’ maras pila’ la. ksyugay ta’ cikay pila’ su’ hma’?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: izyat wah. yalaw gi ini’ su’ pbzhan qu kinsyugan su’ sa minxal na’. yalaw gi
ch: B:不要，因為上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, because you haven’t paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: izyat wah. baha hmswa’ ini’ su’ pbzhan qu kinsyugan su’ sa minxal
ch: B:不要，因為上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, because you haven’t paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: ksyugay ta’ cikay lukus su’ ku?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: ksyugay ta’ cikay lukus su’ ma’?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: aw. agal nanak.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: ksyugay ta’ cikay biru’ su’ hku?
en: A: Can I borrow your book, please?

ab: wal maku’ spksyu Kiraw la.
en: B: I lent it to Kiraw.

ab: ksyugay ta’ cikay zitensya’ su’ hku?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: aw. ana ga, pbzhan suxan ki.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: mqwalax la. nyux saku’ ini’ aras ruku’, pksyugi saku’ ruku’ su’ ku?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It’s raining, I don’t have an umbrella, can you lend me your umbrella?

ab: qutux balay ruku’ maku’, si ta’ kr’agi ’mumuk la, ki.
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let’s stick together!

ab: biru’ qani ga pinksyu su’ kuzing sa minxal, pbshanay misu’ la.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: teta’ biru’ nanu’ qu sozyan su’ mita’ ga, kayal saku’.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: tayta’ biru’ nanu’ qu sawzyan su’ mita’ ga, kayal saku’.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: knwan ga, pbzinhan misu’ kinsyugan maku’ pila’?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: nway. kya pila’ su’ lga, lnglung la.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It’s okay, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: knwan ga, pbzihan saku’ pila’ ka kinsyugan su’ la?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: pbzihay misu’ suxan.
en: A: I’ll return it to you tomorrow.

ab: knwan ga, wahan su’ pbzih qu biru’ ka kinsyugan su’ la?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: aw misu’ wal sbiq shira’ lrwa?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn’t I return it to you yesterday?

ab: pinksyu isu’ ni Tasaw qu inpit qani?
en: A: Did Tasaw lend you this pen?

ab: aw. kinsyugan maku’ ki hya’ soni’
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: aw. kinsyugan maku’ ki hya’ sawni’.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: kinsyugan su’ ki Tasaw qu inpit qani?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Tasaw?

ab: izyat, qani ga, bnazi ni yaya’.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: ungat cimu’ la. usa’ ksyu cikay cimu’ ki Binay ha.
en: A: We are out of salt, go borrow some from Binay.

ab: aw. hala saku’ ksyu.
en: B: Okay, I’ll borrow it.

ab: hali kmal Pisuy maha "biqi qu pila’ ka kinsyugan su’ la." kusa.
en: B: Go tell Pisuy to give me my money back.

ab: pira’ pila’qu kinsyugan nya’?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
